title: viola × coquoziana
intro: Viola × coquoziana is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Viola sororia and Viola philippica, belonging to the Violaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Viola × coquoziana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural antiseptic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications.
